params.name: Laurel Wine
params.description: The laurel tree cut by Wu Gang for thousands of years remains vibrant and alive. Every Mid-Autumn Festival, the laurel tree will bloom fragrant flowers, which are then brewed into a delicious wine, unparalleled in both heaven and earth!
